meta.engine: Blahut-Arimoto reward-complexity frontier with high->low continuation
meta.note: Frontiers and the proposal-comparison Monte-Carlo are computed here. The playable task's own landing point (reader's policy complexity and reward) is computed in the browser from empirical choices. Human means are digitized from Fig 5D-H and flagged, not recomputed.

proposalComparison.algorithm: Blahut-Arimoto on retained set, sampling without replacement
